category_sources: Official urx documentation describes URL collection from Wayback Machine, Common Crawl, and OTX for security testing and analysis.
source_facts.description says urx extracts URLs from OSINT archives for security insights.
display_name_sources: Official repository and documentation use the name Urx/urx.
docs_sources: Official documentation domain urx.hahwul.com is linked from the official GitHub repository and contains getting started, usage, reference, and support docs.
source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository and includes README usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official documentation and README describe a Rust command-line tool for collecting URLs from OSINT archives.
source_facts.description identifies OSINT URL extraction for security insights.
